creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2009-05-03 17:41:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    x11-themes/kde4-windeco-dekorator Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                      pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Add new port x11-themes/kde4-windeco-dekorator.
  
  This is an unofficial port of the famous "deKorator" window decoration
  engine to KDE 4.
  
  WWW:    http://kde-look.org/content/show.php/deKorator?content=87921
  
  PR:             134041
  Submitted by:   Veniamin Gvozdikov <g.veniamin at googlemail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/x11-themes/kde4-windeco-dekorator/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-themes/kde4-windeco-dekorator/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/x11-themes/kde4-windeco-dekorator/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/x11-themes/kde4-windeco-dekorator/pkg-plist (new)
